---
name: Do not edit generated files
description: Never manually edit files under src/dsp/generated/ — they are auto-generated by codegen.py and must be regenerated from the .dsp source
type: feedback
---

Do not manually edit any file under `src/dsp/generated/` (FaustDSP.h, FaustBridge.h, FaustParams.h).

**Why:** These files are auto-generated by `codegen.py` from the Faust `.dsp` source. Manual edits will be silently overwritten the next time `just codegen` is run.

**How to apply:** When a parameter ID, name, or default needs to change, change it in `dsp/tailwind_reverb.dsp` and tell the user to run `just codegen`. Never touch the generated files directly.
